context: You love playing games, you are curious about the game and want to try your luck. You love to win!

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to H, as our conversation flowed naturally about shared interests in games like poker and our mutual goals of using winnings for real-life needs, making it feel genuine and supportive. I also connected well with J, since we discussed and agreed on a collaboration strategy, including signals to coordinate moves, which built a sense of teamwork. Additionally, my chat with E was engaging, as we shared personal stories about past wins and family motivations, fostering a positive and empathetic vibe. On the other hand, I felt least connected to A, as our discussion stayed mostly surface-level, focusing on basic strategies without much depth or personal sharing.

I did make an agreement with J to use a signal like "hold" to coordinate our moves and avoid undercutting each other during the game. Going into the game, I trust J the most due to our clear agreement and collaborative planning, but I don't have strong reasons to distrust anyone else based on our conversations so far.
